title: I don't understand why people on youtube have to be so anonomous

transcript.text: Hello. This video is what's the dealio with people being so goddamn anonymous, man. What the fuck, dude? Jesus fucking Christ. I don't get it. I don't get it. It doesn't really bother me that much.
It's just very puzzling. Very, very puzzling to me. I don't understand. I really don't. I mean, maybe I'm stupid. Maybe there's something that people understand that I don't understand.

Um, but, uh, it doesn't make any sense to me. I don't get it. I don't understand why people have to be so anonymous, um, on YouTube. Um, I get lots of, I get probably three to four comments a day, um, on my videos, on my 1036 videos that I have.
